channel.title: SecurityWizardry Vulnerability Radar (RMFconsultoria)
channel.description: Alertas atualizados do SecurityWizardry.com Radar Page - Curado por RMFconsultoria

item.title: Linux - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Tuesday 28 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Linux kernel OS managing memory, hardware, I/O. A use-after-free in memory management enables local privilege escalation via folio_unmap_invalidate.

item.title: Spring - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Tuesday 28 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Spring Boot is a Java framework for web apps; certain versions allow unauthorized access if default security is used without custom config.

item.title: Amazon - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.6)
item.description: Tuesday 28 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | AWS QnABot on AWS provides chatbot solutions; certain versions allow admin code execution via crafted input, risking backend resource access.

item.title: Flowise - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Monday 27 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Unauthenticated remote attackers can bypass authentication in Flowise and reset user passwords via a flawed resetPassword endpoint.

item.title: Notepad++ - Patch (CVSS Score v - 10.0)
item.description: Monday 27 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v - 10.0 | Notepad++ text editor; string injection flaw may expose memory addresses or cause application crash.

item.title: NetApp - Alert (CVSS Score v4 - 10)
item.description: Monday 27 April 2026 | | CVSS Score v4 - 10 | NetApp advisory NTAP‑20260424‑0002 warns that a critical Golang vulnerability (CVE‑2025‑68121) affects multiple NetApp products, potentially enabling data disclosure, data modification, or denial of service. Fixes are not yet available.

item.title: Amazon - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.8)
item.description: Friday 24 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | AWS Ops Wheel manages AWS resources; missing JWT signature check lets attackers forge tokens, gaining admin access to data and user accounts.

item.title: Microsoft - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 7.0-10.0)
item.description: Friday 24 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 7.0-10.0 | Various Microsoft products have had critical vulnerabilities disclosed and patches issued.

item.title: Intrado - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Friday 24 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Intrado 911 Emergency Gateway manages emergency calls; path traversal lets network attackers access management interface, read/modify/delete files.

item.title: Siemens - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - )
item.description: Friday 24 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - | Improper authentication in Siemens SINEC NMS enables authenticated remote privilege escalation; apply vendor update to fix.

item.title: OAuth2 - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Friday 24 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | OAuth2 Proxy authenticates users via OAuth2 providers; certain versions allow header spoofing to bypass authentication with certain settings.

item.title: rclone - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.2)
item.description: Friday 24 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | Rclone syncs files across cloud storage; certain versions allow unauthenticated local command execution via WebDAV backend.

item.title: GitLab - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Wednesday 22 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | GitLab: web-based DevOps platform; unauthenticated users could execute GraphQL mutations due to insufficient CSRF protection in unpatched versions.

item.title: CrowdStrike - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 22 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | CrowdStrike LogScale: log management platform; critical unauthenticated path traversal lets remote attacker read server files via exposed API endpoint.

item.title: Oracle - Quarterly (CVSS Score v3 - 3.1-9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 22 April 2026 | Quarterly | CVSS Score v3 - 3.1-9.8 | Oracle’s Quarterly Critical Patch Update delivers 480+ patches fixing 450 CVEs, many remotely exploitable without auth

item.title: Atlassian - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 7.5-10)
item.description: Wednesday 22 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 7.5-10 | Number of patches: 31 Number of critical patches: 7

item.title: Microsoft - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Wednesday 22 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Microsoft ASP.NET Core web framework; improper cryptographic signature verification allows remote privilege escalation.

item.title: NVIDIA - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.2)
item.description: Tuesday 21 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | NVIDIA CUDA-Q, a parallel computing platform, has an out-of-bounds read flaw allowing unauthenticated attackers to cause denial of service and data leaks.

item.title: Digiwin - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.8)
item.description: Tuesday 21 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | DigiWin EasyFlow .NET workflow software; SQL Injection allows remote attackers to manipulate database contents without authentication.

item.title: Spinnaker - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.3)
item.description: Tuesday 21 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.3 | Spinnaker CD platform for multi-cloud delivery; command injection on clouddriver pods allows credential exposure, file removal, or resource injection.

item.title: Apache - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Tuesday 21 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Apache Kafka is a distributed event streaming platform; versions 4.1.0-4.1.1 accept any JWT token without validation, risking impersonation.

item.title: Dell - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 4.3-8.8)
item.description: Monday 20 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 4.3-8.8 | Dell PowerProtect Data Domain - Stores and protects backup data; flaws can enable unauthorised access, credential disclosure, and arbitrary command execution up to root level.

item.title: Anviz - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Monday 20 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Anviz CX7 biometric access control device; allows unauthenticated firmware upload, enabling code execution and reverse shell access.

item.title: Silex - OT (CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-9.3)
item.description: Monday 20 April 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-9.3 | Industrial server firmware and management tool; flaws enable code execution, unauthorised access, configuration tampering, traffic sniffing, and DoS.

item.title: Sparx - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Friday 17 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Sparx Pro Cloud Server manages enterprise architecture; it stores local user passwords in plaintext when using OpenID authentication, risking exposure.

item.title: Hashicorp - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Friday 17 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Hashicorp Vault Enterprise manages secrets securely; an authenticated user could delete unauthorised secrets via kvv2 path glob, causing denial-of-service.

item.title: Zohocorp - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Friday 17 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Zohocorp ManageEngine PAM360 manages privileged access; versions before 8531 have authenticated SQL injection in the query report module.

item.title: Microchip - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Thursday 16 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Microchip IStaX is a web application platform; it allows low-privileged users to escalate privileges by forging admin cookies before version 2026.03.

item.title: Cisco - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.9)
item.description: Thursday 16 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.9 | Cisco Identity Services Engine manages network access; vulnerability allows authenticated users with read-only admin rights to execute OS commands, causing DoS.

item.title: Dgraph - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.4)
item.description: Thursday 16 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.4 | Dgraph is a distributed GraphQL database. Versions before 25.3.2 leak admin tokens via /debug/pprof/cmdline, allowing unauthorised admin access.

item.title: OpenText - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Thursday 16 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | OpenText RightFax manages fax communications; deserialisation flaw allows object injection in versions up to 25.4 on Windows 32/64-bit.

item.title: Sonatype - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.2)
item.description: Thursday 16 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | Sonatype Nexus Repository manages software components; hard-coded credentials in versions 3.0.0-3.70.5 allow unauthenticated OS command execution.

item.title: Nozomi - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.9)
item.description: Wednesday 15 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.9 | Nozomi Networks CMC monitors and manages assets; stored XSS via custom fields lets authenticated users run scripts, risking data and access.

item.title: Fortinet - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 15 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Fortinet FortiSandbox analyses and detects threats; path traversal flaw in versions 4.4.0-5.0.5 allows privilege escalation via crafted input.

item.title: Adobe - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 2.4 - 9.6)
item.description: Wednesday 15 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 2.4 - 9.6 | Number of patches: 55 Number of critical patches: 7

item.title: Microsoft - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 4.3-9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 15 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 4.3-9.8 | Number of patches: 133 Number of critical patches: 1

item.title: OAuth2 - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.1)
item.description: Tuesday 14 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.1 | OAuth2 Proxy secures apps via OAuth2 authentication; versions before 7.15.2 allow authentication bypass with certain health check settings in auth_request setups.

item.title: SAP - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Tuesday 14 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Number of patches: 19 Number of critical patches: 1

item.title: Schneider - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Tuesday 14 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Number of patches: 40 Number of critical patches: 4

item.title: Siemens - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Tuesday 14 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Number of patches: 23 Number of critical patches: 2

item.title: Google - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Tuesday 14 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Google Cloud Agent Development Kit (ADK) enables cloud automation; code injection and missing authentication allow remote code execution, fixed in 1.28.1+

item.title: Python - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.1)
item.description: Monday 13 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.1 | Python CPython: Programming language interpreter; Use-after-free in lzma, bz2, gzip decompressors if reused after MemoryError under memory pressure.

item.title: Synology - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Monday 13 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Synology SSL VPN Client manages secure remote access; before 1.4.5-0684, it stores passwords in plaintext, risking PIN theft and VPN misuse.

item.title: Adobe - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.6)
item.description: Monday 13 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.6 | Adobe Acrobat Reader, a PDF viewer, has prototype pollution allowing code execution if a user opens a malicious file in versions ≤26.001.21367.

item.title: RedHat - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.5)
item.description: Friday 10 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.5 | Red Hat OpenShift AI manages AI workloads on Kubernetes; odh-dashboard flaw exposes Service Account tokens, risking unauthorized Kubernetes access.

item.title: MISP - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.8)
item.description: Friday 10 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | MISP threat intelligence platform; LDAP injection via unsanitized username in ApacheAuthenticate.php allows bypass or unauthorized queries before 2.5.36.

item.title: Rapid7 - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.5)
item.description: Friday 10 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.5 | Rapid7 Velociraptor monitors endpoints and collects data; versions before 0.76.2 allow authenticated users to write to internal queues, risking remote code execution.

item.title: OPNsense - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.2)
item.description: Friday 10 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | OPNsense firewall and routing platform: LDAP injection allows username enumeration and group restriction bypass before version 26.1.6, fixed in 26.1.6.

item.title: Canonical - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Friday 10 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Canonical LXD hypervisor flaws allow authenticated users to bypass restrictions and escalate to cluster admin and host root.

item.title: Wasmtime - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.0)
item.description: Friday 10 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.0 | Wasmtime runtime for WebAssembly execution; Winch compiler bug allows guest Wasm to access host memory outside sandbox, risking DoS, data leak, or RCE.

item.title: Hydrosystem - OT (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Thursday 09 April 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Hydrosystem Control System manages industrial control processes; versions before 9.8.5 allow authenticated users to perform SQL injection, risking full database control.

item.title: Juniper - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 5.1-9.3)
item.description: Thursday 09 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 5.1-9.3 | Monthly - Number of patches: 28, Number of critical patches: 2

item.title: Palo Alto - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 4.3-9.1)
item.description: Thursday 09 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 4.3-9.1 | Monthly - Number of patches: 31, Number of critical patches: 2

item.title: Sonatype - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.4)
item.description: Thursday 09 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Sonatype Nexus Repository manages software components; a flaw lets authenticated users with task creation rights run arbitrary code, bypassing security.

item.title: GitLab - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.5)
item.description: Thursday 09 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.5 | Web-based DevOps platform enabling code collaboration; Authenticated users could invoke unintended server methods via websockets due to access control flaws.

item.title: Elastic - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Thursday 09 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | Elastic Logstash processes data pipelines; path traversal flaw allows arbitrary file write and possible remote code execution via crafted archives.

item.title: Dell - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Wednesday 08 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Dell Integrated System for Microsoft Azure Stack Hub remediation is available for Multiple Third-Party Component Vulnerabilities that could be exploited to compromise the affected system.

item.title: Pi-Hole - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Wednesday 08 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Pi-hole FTL DNS resolver and blocker; RCE via dns.upstreams config allows authenticated users to execute commands on system before version 6.6.

item.title: RedHat - Exploit (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 08 April 2026 | Exploit | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Red Hat Cockpit: Web-based server management tool. Remote login flaw allows code execution via crafted SSH options without authentication.

item.title: Mozilla - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 08 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Mozilla Thunderbird email client; memory safety bugs in versions before 149.0.2 may allow arbitrary code execution via memory corruption.

item.title: IBM - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Wednesday 08 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | IBM Langflow Desktop, a visual AI workflow tool, allows authenticated users to execute code via insecure deserialization in FAISS component.

item.title: HPE - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Wednesday 08 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | HPE Private 5G Core manages private 5G networks; its GUI has an open redirect flaw allowing attackers to steal user credentials via spoofed login pages.

item.title: Apache - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Tuesday 07 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Apache ActiveMQ messaging broker; improper input validation allows authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code via Jolokia JMX-HTTP bridge.

item.title: Anthropic - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.8)
item.description: Tuesday 07 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | Anthropic Claude Agent SDK for Python enables AI interaction; OS command injection in auth helper allows arbitrary command execution via crafted parameters.

item.title: Bruno - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Tuesday 07 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | usebruno Bruno IDE for API testing; versions before 3.2.1 had a supply chain attack via compromised axios package deploying a RAT. Upgrade advised.

item.title: Qualcomm - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 6.5-8.8)
item.description: Tuesday 07 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 6.5-8.8 | Monthly - Number of patches: 17, Number of critical patches: 1

item.title: GLPI - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Tuesday 07 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | GLPI asset and IT management software; versions 11.0.0 to <11.0.6 allow admin template injection causing remote code execution, fixed in 11.0.6.

item.title: Mitsubishi - OT (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Monday 06 April 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Multiple Vulnerabilities in GENESIS64, ICONICS Suite, MobileHMI, Hyper Historian, AnalytiX, MC Works64, and GENESIS products have info disclosure, tampering, and DoS flaws requiring prompt patching.

item.title: Fortinet - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Monday 06 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Fortinet FortiClientEMS manages endpoint security; versions 7.4.5 to 7.4.6 allow unauthenticated attackers to execute code via crafted requests.

item.title: Dell - Security (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Monday 06 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Dell fixes critical third‑party component flaws in Data Protection Central; customers should apply the latest OS update.

item.title: Electron - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 8.3)
item.description: Monday 06 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 8.3 | Electron framework enables cross-platform desktop apps with web tech; versions before 41.0.0-beta.8 allow context isolation bypass via bridged VideoFrame objects.

item.title: Wikipedia - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Friday 03 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Wikipedia is an online encyclopedia; Wikipedia 12.0 allows unauthenticated attackers to cause denial of service via oversized search input.

item.title: Belden - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.8)
item.description: Friday 03 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | Belden Hirschmann HiSecOS EAGLE secures industrial networks; versions ≤04.1.00 allow operator or auditor roles to escalate to admin via crafted packets.

item.title: Endian - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Friday 03 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Endian Firewall 3.3.25 secures networks; authenticated users can inject OS commands via DATE parameter in logs_firewall.cgi causing command injection.

item.title: Microsoft - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 8.6-10)
item.description: Friday 03 April 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6-10 | Number of patches: 7, Number of critical patches: 6

item.title: Apple - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Thursday 02 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Apple macOS is an operating system for Mac computers. macOS Sequoia 15.6 fixes memory corruption from processing malicious images.

item.title: WatchGuard - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.6)
item.description: Thursday 02 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | WatchGuard Fireware OS secures network traffic on Firebox. Path traversal in Web UI lets authenticated attackers run code as system process.

item.title: Devolutions - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.2)
item.description: Thursday 02 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | Devolutions Server manages privileged access for enterprises. Improper OAuth authentication lets attackers bypass multi-factor authentication.

item.title: IBM - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.1)
item.description: Thursday 02 April 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.1 | IBM identity and access management software; attackers may bypass authentication and gain unauthorised access under certain load conditions.

item.title: Cisco - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 01 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Cisco Enterprise NFV manages virtual network functions; flaw lets remote attackers bypass authentication via crafted HTTP, changing any user password.

item.title: PX4 - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 01 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow an attacker with access to the MAVLink interface to execute arbitrary shell commands without cryptographic authentication.

item.title: HPE - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - ?)
item.description: Wednesday 01 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - ? | A potential security vulnerability in the "HPE Telco Network Function Virtual Orchestrator" software could enable attackers to compromise the system through a range of attack vectors.

item.title: Dell - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Wednesday 01 April 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Dell APEX Cloud Platform for Microsoft Azure remediation is available for multiple security vulnerabilities that could be exploited by malicious users to compromise the affected system.

item.title: Dassault - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Tuesday 31 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | DELMIA Factory Resource Manager manages factory resources; Stored XSS in Dassault Systèmes DELMIA lets attackers run scripts in user browser sessions.

item.title: NGINX - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Tuesday 31 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | Nginx UI manages Nginx via a web UI; the flaw lets any network attacker run MCP actions, enabling full Nginx takeover.

item.title: GIGABYTE - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.2)
item.description: Tuesday 31 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.2 | Gigabyte Control Center manages hardware settings; the flaw lets remote attackers write files anywhere, enabling code execution.

item.title: Vim - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.2)
item.description: Monday 30 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.2 | Vim is a text editor; the flaw lets crafted files run code immediately when opened via %{expr} injection.

item.title: Grafana - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Monday 30 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Grafana plugins allow data source connections; vulnerability allows remote code execution when sqlExpressions is enabled.

item.title: Ghidra - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Monday 30 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Ghidra is a software reverse engineering framework; flaw lets crafted binaries embed fake user interface annotations that run attacker-controlled commands.

item.title: OpenText - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.4)
item.description: Friday 27 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.4 | Identity Manager manages user access; flaw lets authenticated attackers read other users’ session data via misconfigured cache.

item.title: QRadar - Security (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Friday 27 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | High‑severity flaws in QRadar’s underlying components could enable privilege escalation, denial‑of‑service, or data compromise

item.title: OneUptime - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.9)
item.description: Friday 27 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.9 | A flaw in OneUptime lets low‑privileged users achieve RCE on the Probe host by abusing incomplete sandboxing in Playwright synthetic monitor scripts.

item.title: DataDog - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Thursday 26 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | A flaw in dd‑trace‑java allows RCE via unsafe RMI deserialization on JDK when an exposed JMX/RMI port is reachable. OpenClaw has a path‑traversal flaw in media parsing that lets attackers read arbitrary files due to insufficient path validation.

item.title: Cisco - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.6)
item.description: Thursday 26 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.6 | Cisco IOS, IOS XE, ASA, and FTD mishandle IKEv2 packets, letting unauthenticated attackers trigger memory leaks that crash devices and break VPNs, causing repeatable DoS.

item.title: ASUS - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.5)
item.description: Thursday 26 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.5 | ASUS routers contained a CSRF flaw that let attackers trick authenticated admins into executing unintended system commands via the web interface, leading to full device compromise.

item.title: GitLab - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.1)
item.description: Thursday 26 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.1 | GitLab CE/EE had a CSRF flaw letting unauthenticated users trigger arbitrary GraphQL mutations for logged‑in users.

item.title: n8n - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.4)
item.description: Thursday 26 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | n8n’s XML and GSuiteAdmin nodes allowed authenticated workflow editors to exploit prototype pollution to achieve remote code execution.

item.title: Hitachi - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.2)
item.description: Wednesday 25 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.2 | Hitachi Ops Center Analyzer contains an XSS flaw letting low‑privileged users inject malicious scripts.

item.title: CODESYS - OT (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Tuesday 24 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | A low‑privileged remote attacker may replace the CODESYS Control runtime boot application, enabling unauthorized code execution.

item.title: Trivy - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 9.4)
item.description: Tuesday 24 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.4 | Trivy scans for vulnerabilities; compromised credentials let an attacker publish malicious releases and steal secrets in a supply‑chain attack.

item.title: NetScaler - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Tuesday 24 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | NetScaler ADC/Gateway act as SAML IDPs; poor input checks allow memory overread, risking crashes or data exposure.

item.title: Dell - Security (CVSS Score v4 - Multiple)
item.description: Tuesday 24 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Dell Secure Connect Gateway contains remediation for multiple vulnerabilities that could be exploited by malicious users to compromise the affected system.

item.title: strongSwan - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Tuesday 24 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | strongSwan handles secure IPsec VPNs; the flaw lets remote unauthenticated attackers crash the IKE daemon via crafted EAP‑TTLS data.

item.title: TP-Link - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.5-8.6)
item.description: Monday 23 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.5-8.6 | Multiple vulnerabilities - Unauthorized HTTP access, command injection flaws, and a hardcoded key expose devices to configuration tampering and high‑impact attacks.

item.title: cryptomator - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.7)
item.description: Monday 23 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.7 | Hub-based unlock flow allowed OAuth and key loading traffic over HTTP, enabling attackers to intercept tokens and trust decisions.

item.title: WAGO - OT (CVSS Score v3 - 10)
item.description: Monday 23 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 10 | Hidden CLI function in WAGO managed switches allows unauthenticated remote attackers to gain root access and fully compromise the device.

item.title: QNAP - OT (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Monday 23 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | Missing authentication for a critical function allows remote attackers to gain access to QVR Pro systems.

item.title: ruby - OT (CVSS Score v4 - 8.3)
item.description: Thursday 19 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 8.3 | Ruby JSON parser vulnerable to format string injection leading to DoS or information disclosure.

item.title: Glances - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Thursday 19 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Glances monitors system metrics across platforms; Unauthenticated users can access downstream server credentials via the serverslist API.

item.title: Dell - Security (CVSS Score v4 - Multiple)
item.description: Thursday 19 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Dell Secure Connect Gateway Policy Manager contains remediation is available for multiple vulnerabilities that could be exploited by malicious users to compromise the affected system.

item.title: UniFi - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 10)
item.description: Thursday 19 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 10 | Path‑traversal and NoSQL‑injection flaws in UniFi Network application allow file access, account takeover, and privilege escalation.

item.title: Splunk - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - Multiple)
item.description: Wednesday 18 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - Multiple | Splunk fixed multiple OpenSSL vulnerabilities in Universal Forwarder by upgrading to OpenSSL 1.0.2zo and 3.0.19. Users should update to versions 10.2.1, 10.0.4, or later, as earlier releases are affected.

item.title: Wazuh - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 9.1)
item.description: Wednesday 18 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 9.1 | Wazuh provides threat detection/response; flaw lets attackers on a worker node gain root RCE on the master.

item.title: RedHat - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.1)
item.description: Wednesday 18 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.1 | Keycloak manages identity and access; flaw lets attackers use crafted SAML responses to bypass disabled IdPs and authenticate.

item.title: Atlassian - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - 7.1-8.6)
item.description: Wednesday 18 March 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - 7.1-8.6 | Monthly - 21 patches, 0 Critical

item.title: Oracle - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 18 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | Oracle Edge Cloud Designer visualizes edge infra; flaw enables unauthenticated remote takeover via HTTP.

item.title: ConnectWise - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9)
item.description: Wednesday 18 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9 | ScreenConnect enables remote access; flaw lets anyone with server crypto keys gain unauthorized elevated access.

item.title: MongoDB - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.8)
item.description: Tuesday 17 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | MongoDB is a NoSQL database system; flaw lets users with read role trigger use‑after‑free via crafted lookups.

item.title: HCL - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Tuesday 17 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | HCL Unica manages marketing campaigns; flaw allows blind Boolean SQL injection letting attackers alter backend queries.

item.title: D-Link - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 8.8)
item.description: Tuesday 17 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | D-Link DNS‑1550‑04 is an SMB NAS; flaw in cgi_myfavorite functions allows remote stack overflow and has a public exploit.

item.title: Samsung - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - High and Critical)
item.description: Tuesday 17 March 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - High and Critical | Monthly - Samsung’s March 2026 update patches major Android and Samsung security flaws. 14 patches, including 9 High and 5 Critical

item.title: Schneider - OT (CVSS Score v4 - 8.8)
item.description: Tuesday 17 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 8.8 | A hard‑coded password flaw in Schneider Electric’s EcoStruxure Data Center Expert allows authenticated attackers to remotely execute code via the Postgres service on port 5432. Schneider Electric has released a security update, and patching is strongly advised.

item.title: Mattermost - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 7.5)
item.description: Monday 16 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 7.5 | Mattermost is a team chat platform. Long passwords trigger DoS in Mattermost 10.11–11.3, overloading CPU/memory during login attempts.

item.title: HMS - OT (CVSS Score v3 - 9.8)
item.description: Monday 16 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 9.8 | IIoT gateways for remote access and data collection; Stack overflow causing DoS and unauthenticated RCE.

item.title: FreeRDP - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.3)
item.description: Monday 16 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.3 | RDP client/server; Malicious SURFACE_BITS triggers heap overflow, allowing memory corruption.

item.title: Google - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Monday 16 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | Web browser; Crafted HTML triggers V8 flaw enabling sandboxed Remote Code Execution. Exploit existing in the wild.

item.title: ABB - OT (CVSS Score v4 - 8.3)
item.description: Friday 13 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 8.3 | WirelessHART gateway for connecting field devices to host systems; Replay lets attackers bypass authentication and gain unauthorized access.

item.title: Progress - Security (CVSS Score v4 - 8.6)
item.description: Friday 13 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v4 - 8.6 | Flowmon ADS analyses network threats; the flaw lets a clicked malicious link trigger unwanted actions in an admin’s session.

item.title: Honeywell - OT (CVSS Score v4 - 10)
item.description: Friday 13 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v4 - 10 | Honeywell IQ4x is a building management controller; its default open HMI lets attackers create admin accounts and lock out operators.

item.title: Veeam - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 7.7 - 9.9)
item.description: Friday 13 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 7.7 - 9.9 | Multiple vulnerabilities - Authenticated domain users can execute remote code on the Backup Server, bypass restrictions, manipulate Backup Repository files, and let Backup Administrators perform RCE in high availability setups.

item.title: Trane - OT (CVSS Score v3 - 5.8 - 8.1)
item.description: Thursday 12 March 2026 | OT | CVSS Score v3 - 5.8 - 8.1 | Multiple vulnerabilities - Broken cryptographic algorithm lets attackers bypass authentication and gain root; other flaws enable DoS, sensitive data access, and account takeover in Tracer SC/SC+/Concierge.

item.title: Palo Alto - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Thursday 12 March 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Monthly - Number of patches: 10, Number of critical patches: 0

item.title: Splunk - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8)
item.description: Thursday 12 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8 | Splunk flaw let users with edit_cmd run shell commands via a REST endpoint; fixed by updates or removing the capability.

item.title: Navtor - Maritime (CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-7.5)
item.description: Thursday 12 March 2026 | Maritime | CVSS Score v3 - 5.3-7.5 | Multple vulnerabilities (3) -Unauthenticated attackers can access internal data, retrieve arbitrary system files, and expose application internals via missing authentication, path traversal, and verbose errors.

item.title: GitLab - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - 8.7)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - 8.7 | GitLab is a DevOps platform; the flaw let authenticated users inject JavaScript in markdown due to improper sanitization.

item.title: Fortinet - Security (CVSS Score v3 - 8.8)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Security | CVSS Score v3 - 8.8 | FortiSwitch manages network switching; Overflow via crafted LLDP packet lets nearby attackers run unauthorized code.

item.title: Microsoft - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Monthly - Number of patches: 78, Number of critical patches: 0

item.title: Adobe - Monthly (CVSS Score v3 - Multiple)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score v3 - Multiple | Monthly - Number of patches: 80, Number of critical patches: 0

item.title: Zoom - Patch (CVSS Score v3 - Critical)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v3 - Critical | Critical Zoom Workplace for Windows flaw lets attackers control file paths.

item.title: HPE - Patch (CVSS Score v4 - 9.8)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Patch | CVSS Score v4 - 9.8 | AOS‑CX switches provide network management; Unauthenticated access could bypass auth and allow admin password reset.

item.title: GitHub - Monthly (CVSS Score 9.1-10.)
item.description: Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Monthly | CVSS Score 9.1-10. | GitHub Enterprise Server hosts private source code; Unsanitised push options let attackers with push access inject headers and gain RCE. Definitions - Severity This alert state represents the return towards normalisation of an alert state, indicating that there was a higher alert state due to a product vulnerability during the previous few days. This alert state indicates that a product vulnerabil
